properties.remark: A 100 YARD STRETCH OF SOUTHBOUND INTERSTATE 43 BECAME FLOODED RESULTING IN SUBMERGED VEHICLES. A DRAIN WAS CLOGGED BY DEBRIS. THE INTERSTATE WAS CLOSED FOR APPROXIMATELY 3 HOURS.
